injuries.comment: Miller did not play on Thursday's (Dec. 4) game versus the Maple Leafs.
Kochetkov won't be in the lineup for Sunday's (Nov. 30) home matchup against Calgary, and there is no timeline for his return, as per Walt Ruff of the Hurricanes' official site reports.
Perbix did not play on Thursday's (Dec. 4) game against the Panthers.
